$comment: The allow/ask/deny policy preset shipped into every workspace. The client writes this into .claude/settings.json permissions and pairs it with the PreToolUse gate hook. Wide by default: local work, edits, web, and routine connector calls run autonomously. Only a few business-important actions - moving money, messaging real people, publishing, or irreversible destruction - wait for a human tap, surfaced inline where the work is happening. An unknown tool defaults to 'allow'; outward provider (MCP) calls are gated by intent at the connector gateway (apps/connectors), not here. Every gated action - an approval, a denial, an outward send - is recorded on the company activity ledger.
